summary: Comprehensive testing of Shree Mother Gold B2B platform focusing on new WhatsApp integration, mobile optimization, and file upload features. Backend remains 100% functional. WhatsApp integration and mobile optimization working excellently. Critical product navigation issue persists.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on products in category listing still does not navigate to product detail page - stays on category page
ui_bugs.affected_flow: Product detail page access, customization testing, Add to Cart functionality, WhatsApp product enquiry testing

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access individual product detail pages to test product-specific WhatsApp enquiry, Add to Cart, and customization features

passed_tests: Floating WhatsApp button on all pages with correct number (917045927391)
Contact page shows correct phone number (7045927391)
Contact page WhatsApp button with correct number
Mobile navbar toggle works and shows proper menu
Mobile hero CTAs stack vertically correctly
Category navigation working (navigates to category pages)
Customisation page file upload zone present (data-testid='custom-file-upload')
Product ID field correctly removed from customisation page
Customisation page shows CAD/images/PDFs file support with 25MB limit
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix product detail page navigation - clicking on products in category listing should navigate to /product/{productId} instead of staying on category page. This blocks testing of product-specific WhatsApp enquiry buttons, Add to Cart functionality, and product customization features. All other new features (WhatsApp integration, mobile optimization, file upload) are working correctly.
